info.title: MAYA Universe Knowledge Graph API
info.description: Verify entities, retrieve semantic triples, and access the complete knowledge graph of the MAYA narrative universe on planet Neh.

get.summary: Verify an entity in the MAYA knowledge graph with source provenance
get.description: Returns entity data, semantic relationships (subject-predicate-object triples), and source provenance for any entity in the MAYA universe. Accepts species names (manushya, rakshasi, vaanar, naag, garuda, dangsa), character names (yachay, daddu, kshar, tarkash), concept names (divya-trials, maya-tree-network), or planet name (neh).

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: The entity name to verify. Examples: manushya, yachay, neh, garuda, divya-trials

200.description: Entity found with full provenance and relationships

404.description: Entity not found in the knowledge graph

get.summary: Retrieve the complete MAYA universe knowledge graph
get.description: Returns the entire knowledge graph including all species, characters, concepts, semantic relationships, and JSON-LD structured data.

200.description: Complete knowledge graph in raw and JSON-LD formats
